title: Specify target build request
description: Closed-shape per-slice build request handed to a target adapter by `specify slice build`. Keyed on `(slice, target)`, but the payload omits `target` (the recipient adapter is the target), `execution` (the CLI uses the declared mode to choose delivery), brief paths, and `model.yaml` (audit/provenance input to the rendered artifacts, not a build input). Targets build from rendered artifacts; target-specific input growth goes through the explicit `inputs.artifacts.additional` list assembled from the bound adapter's manifest.

project-dir.description: Working tree the target builds into and validates against. Distinct from `inputs.root`: in workspace mode this is `<workspace>/.specify/workspace/<project>`.

root.description: Slice tree that all artifact paths resolve against. In workspace mode this is `<workspace>/.specify/slices/<slice>`.

specs.description: One or more per-domain `spec.md` files, relative to `inputs.root`.

additional.description: Target-specific inputs declared by the bound adapter's manifest (e.g. vectis `tokens.yaml` / `assets.yaml` / `components.yaml` or the contracts `contracts/` subtree), each relative to `inputs.root`.
